topIngredients.name: Avobenzone 3%
topIngredients.benefit: UVA protection for sport and outdoor activities

topIngredients.name: Octocrylene 10%
topIngredients.benefit: Stabilizes UV filters under intense sun exposure

topIngredients.name: Homosalate 15%
topIngredients.benefit: Broad UVB coverage suitable for active use

verdict: Banana Boat Sport performs well for active use with strong water resistance. Chemical filter formula is effective but the fragrance and oxybenzone content limit its score for health-conscious consumers.
